infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ProField AI uses your camera to capture photos and videos for mission documentation.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ProField AI uses your microphone for voice dictation and video recording.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ProField AI uses your location to geotag observations and missions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ProField AI accesses your photo library to attach images to reports.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to securely access your ProField AI account.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ProField AI to access your camera.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow ProField AI to access your microphone.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ProField AI to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow ProField AI to save photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow ProField AI to use your location.
